AsilbekIELTS.title: I’m Asilbek
AsilbekIELTS.intro: I’ve been helping students prepare for IELTS for over 5 years. <highlight>My band score is 8.5</highlight>, and more than <highlight>1,000 students</highlight> have studied with me and achieved their educational goals, including <highlight>100+</highlight>who scored <highlight>7+.</highlight>
AsilbekIELTS.subscribeText: Получай ежедневные советы по английскому, разборы сложных тем, мотивацию и полезные материалы прямо в телефон. Всё бесплатно.
AsilbekIELTS.note: Нажимая кнопку, ты соглашаешься получать сообщения от канала. Отписаться можно в любой момент.

story.title: My Story
story.part1: Hello, I'm Asilbek Makhkamov, and my passion is helping students succeed in their exams with confidence. My own journey in education started early—I was always curious and motivated, and I actually began school two years ahead of many of my peers. Thanks to a few smart study strategies I picked up along the way, I consistently excelled, graduating from school with a perfect 4.0 GPA.
story.part2: I went on to study engineering at university, and even there, I continued to thrive, earning another 4.0 GPA upon graduation. But my path took an exciting turn toward language education when, in the 11th grade, I took the IELTS exam myself and scored 7.5—well above the average level at the time. That experience opened my eyes to the difference that effective preparation and guidance can make.
story.part3: Soon after, I began working as a teacher assistant at a local test prep center. Over the next four years, I taught and guided students one-on-one and in groups, helping over a thousand learners achieve results far above the national average. While the average IELTS score in Uzbekistan hovered around 5.5, many of my students consistently scored 6.5, 7, or higher. Seeing their success was incredibly rewarding and solidified my commitment to education.
story.part4: Building on that experience, I launched my own test prep center, where I focus on creating high-quality courses and resources for students. Over the past year, I’ve been developing both offline and online programs, aiming to make test preparation more effective, accessible, and less stressful for every student. My goal is simple: to empower learners to achieve their best scores and pursue their academic dreams with confidence.
story.part5: Looking ahead, I want this page to be more than just a hub for learning—I want it to be a window into my journey. I’ll share the experiences, lessons, and discoveries I encounter along the way, so you can see exactly what goes into building success and growth. Together, we’ll navigate this path, and I’ll make sure you’re fully prepared, inspired, and supported every step of the way.

subscribe.title: Join <accent>IELTS Delivered</accent>
subscribe.subtitle: Become a part of a fast-growing online community and receive regular IELTS insights. Every day, I share actionable IELTS tips, proven preparation methods, and test-day strategies to help you perform at your best — free, and always will be. You’ll also get access to real exam examples, common mistakes to avoid, and practical guidance tailored for all skill levels. Whether you’re just starting or aiming for a higher band score, this community is here to support your journey every step of the way.
subscribe.note: You can leave at any time by clicking the unsubscribe button

about.name: Asilbek Makhkamov
about.intro: I help students succeed in their exams with confidence. I’ve always loved learning—starting school two years early and graduating with a perfect 4.0 GPA. I carried that drive into university, earning another 4.0 in engineering.
about.story1: My journey with IELTS began in 11th grade when I took the test myself and scored 7.5—higher than most teachers at the time. Inspired, I started working at a local test prep center, first as a teacher assistant, then as a full teacher. Over four years, I’ve guided over a thousand students to results far above Uzbekistan’s average—most scoring 6.5, 7, or higher.
about.story2: Today, I run my own test prep center, creating courses and resources to make exam preparation smarter, easier, and more effective. I’m now launching online programs to reach even more learners, helping them achieve high scores and pursue their academic goals without the stress.
about.story3: Education changed my life, and now I’m here to help students achieve their best results and unlock their potential.

aboutSection.subtitle: An English teacher with international-level expertise. For over 5 years, I have been helping people speak confidently and fluently.
aboutSection.fact1: I have been teaching English since 2018. I started with private lessons, and now I help hundreds of students pass IELTS and communicate freely.
aboutSection.fact2: My personal result is IELTS 9.0 (Expert user). Full command of the language: accuracy, fluency, and naturalness.
aboutSection.fact3: I developed my own teaching methodology that combines native speaker insights with proven learning techniques.
aboutSection.fact4: Thousands of students have already improved their English and achieved their goals through my lessons and materials.
aboutSection.fact5: I create useful content: videos, breakdowns, exercises, and motivation for those who want to speak beautifully and confidently.
aboutSection.fact6: Everything I do is driven by a passion to help you reach a high level of English quickly and with enjoyment.

productivity.title: Free YouTube
productivity.desc: Free English lessons on YouTube: proven working methods tested on hundreds of students, step-by-step strategies for rapid progress, real case studies, and advice from those who have already achieved results

youtube.title: Offline Classes
youtube.desc: Personalized approach for each student, lessons starting from 2 hours with deep immersion, structured preparation, and development of strong academic English skills

business.title: Private Club B9Lab
business.desc: Full access to a library of recorded lessons, exclusive streams, detailed homework reviews, as well as personal recommendations and continuous support at every stage

threads.subtitle: I share short thoughts, insights, and real IELTS-related questions students face. It’s a dynamic format where you can explore preparation from a different perspective, reflect, and find answers through discussion
